title: Product UX remediation closeout
summary: Close the reopened product UX remediation only after all tasks are independently reviewed, integrated, validated, merged and pushed with public gates preserved.
acceptance: All reopened product-UX remediation tasks WM-0146 through WM-0155 are done, independently reviewed as verified and integrated
Closeout records the final state of visible NPC action, lamp/build command loop, UI hierarchy, i18n, responsive behavior, visual evidence and remaining release blockers
Full required gates pass and main/origin main are synchronized after merge and push
Closeout preserves public release, EA, store, signing, telemetry, accounts, paid services and public save compatibility owner gates
No task is marked complete unless reviewer verification and integration evidence exist
forbiddenPaths: telemetry, accounts, hosted feedback or paid services
changing Web demo-only or Windows controlled-test verdicts without owner approval
